reviews.review_title: A fun and relaxing dark ride
reviews.review_description:
I love dark rides in real life, but rarely get a chance to go on them.
This one is well thought out, fun, and relaxing. It's about 3 minutes long (but you can go on again and again!). It is reminiscent of It's a Small World, yet completely unique. It definitely feels like it could be a ride at a real life theme park.
